mapper.select: SELECT * FROM amz_replenishment_formula_config ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE amz_replenishment_formula_config SET region_name = #{regionName}, marketplaces = #{marketplaces}, strategy_type = COALESCE(#{strategyType}, 'CUSTOM'), sales_weight_14d = #{salesWeight14d}, sales_weight_30d = #{salesWeight30d}, sales_weight_60d = #{salesWeight60d}, month_multiplier = #{monthMultiplier}, safety_days = #{safetyDays}, ship_days = #{shipDays}, replenish_days = #{replenishDays}, deduct_fba_stock = COALESCE(#{deductFbaStock}, 1), deduct_fba_inbound = COALESCE(#{deductFbaInbound}, 1), deduct_domestic_stock = COALESCE(#{deductDomesticStock}, 1), deduct_purchased_qty = COALESCE(#{deductPurchasedQty}, 1), deduct_pending_ship_qty = COALESCE(#{deductPendingShipQty}, 1), allow_negative_replenish = COALESCE(#{allowNegativeReplenish}, 1), min_replenish_qty = #{minReplenishQty}, max_replenish_qty = #{maxReplenishQty}, round_mode = COALESCE(#{roundMode}, 'NONE'), formula_weighted_daily = #{formulaWeightedDaily}, formula_monthly = #{formulaMonthly}, formula_safety = #{formulaSafety}, formula_ship = #{formulaShip}, formula_replenish = #{formulaReplenish}, formula_restock = #{formulaRestock}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amz_replenishment_formula_config ( region_group, region_name, marketplaces, strategy_type, sales_weight_14d, sales_weight_30d, sales_weight_60d, month_multiplier, safety_days, ship_days, replenish_days, deduct_fba_stock, deduct_fba_inbound, deduct_domestic_stock, deduct_purchased_qty, deduct_pending_ship_qty, allow_negative_replenish, min_replenish_qty, max_replenish_qty, round_mode, formula_weighted_daily, formula_monthly, formula_safety, formula_ship, formula_replenish, formula_restock, enabled, remark ) VALUES ( #{regionGroup}, #{regionName}, #{marketplaces}, COALESCE(#{strategyType}, 'CUSTOM'), #{salesWeight14d}, #{salesWeight30d}, #{salesWeight60d}, #{monthMultiplier}, #{safetyDays}, #{shipDays}, #{replenishDays}, COALESCE(#{deductFbaStock}, 1), COALESCE(#{deductFbaInbound}, 1), COALESCE(#{deductDomesticStock}, 1), COALESCE(#{deductPurchasedQty}, 1), COALESCE(#{deductPendingShipQty}, 1), COALESCE(#{allowNegativeReplenish}, 1), #{minReplenishQty}, #{maxReplenishQty}, COALESCE(#{roundMode}, 'NONE'), #{formulaWeightedDaily}, #{formulaMonthly}, #{formulaSafety}, #{formulaShip}, #{formulaReplenish}, #{formulaRestock}, #{enabled}, #{remark} )
